lesson.menu_desc: Milestones & Past Simple irregular verbs -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 14 -- Company History (Irregular Verbs)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Rafael Gasparelli Lima | Aula 14 -- Company History

listenings.text: Welcome to our company history tour. Let me tell you how it all began. In nineteen ninety-eight, two lawyers founded a small firm with only one room and a single desk. In the first years, the firm grew slowly, but it built a strong reputation in the city. In two thousand and five, it bought a smaller office and took over two local competitors. The team became one of the most respected in the region. In two thousand and twelve, the firm won a national award for legal excellence. Today, after a big merger, the company has offices in three countries. From one desk to three countries, this is our story.

When I joined this company, it was still small. I remember the year we won our first national client. Everyone worked hard, and slowly the firm grew. We built new departments, we bought better systems, and we became a real player in the market. The hardest moment was the merger. Two companies became one, and at first nobody knew the new rules. But we found a way. We kept our values, we took over the new offices with respect, and in the end the merger made us stronger. When I look at the timeline on the wall, I do not see only dates. I see the people who built every step.

extra_audio.text: First, in nineteen ninety-eight, two lawyers founded the firm with a single desk. Then, in the first years, the firm grew slowly and built a strong reputation. Next, in two thousand and five, it bought a new office and took over two local competitors. After that, the firm became one of the most respected in the region and won a national award. Finally, after a big merger, the company opened offices in three countries.
